programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents' former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: Two siblings set out on a mission to rescue their ex-spy parents. Summoned back to work from their uneventful lives, the adults run into trouble while on duty. When the children are called upon to help them, they find out about their parents' former identities while at the same time developing a greater appreciation for each other.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: A globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. A Secret Agent finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis. Our hero must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: Roofman
programme.desc: Escaped convict Jeffrey Manchester hides out in a Toys "R" Us, surviving undetected for months while planning his next move. However, his double life starts to unravel when he falls for a divorced mum, setting off a compelling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: A half-mortal, half-immortal is out to avenge his mother's death and rid the world of vampires. The modern-day technologically advanced vampires he is going after are in search of his special blood type needed to summon an evil god who plays a key role in their plan to execute the human race.

programme.title: Æon Flux
programme.desc: Aeon lives in a world restricted to the last city on Earth, after a plague has destroyed the rest of the world. The city is ruled by a council and its chairman, and people are mysteriously disappearing. Aeon is an assassin for an underground group of rebels called the Monicans, and is assigned to remove the Chairman, but at the last minute she finds herself unable to do it.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Filmmaker Terri Flores is travelling deep in the Amazon jungle looking for a forgotten tribe. Terri and her crew, which includes an anthropologist and a cameraman, come across Paul, who is stranded on the riverbank. He offers to help them find the tribe, but his secretive behaviour puts everyone on edge. They realise too late that he's using them to find a legendary anaconda that's worth a fortune, if they can catch it.

programme.title: Anacondas: The Hunt for the Blood Orchid
programme.desc: As the search to find a rare flower in the jungles of Borneo gets underway, the situation deteriorates rapidly. First infighting amongst the research team breaks out, but soon they have a problem which unites them; there is a very large and very hungry snake present.

programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview

programme.title: Timestalker
programme.desc: Hapless Agnes repeatedly falls for the wrong guy, dies a grim death, and is reincarnated a century later. As she experiences romantic misfortune through different eras of history, Agnes seeks to avoid repeat mistakes and finally break the cycle.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: A leaving party for New Yorker Rob Hawkins is rudely interrupted by the arrival of an unwelcome guest, something that has a penchant for smashing up skyscrapers, playing football with the Statue of Liberty's head and handpicking humans as snacks.

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: Dr Ryan Stone and Matt Kowalski are stranded in space with no way to contact Earth after their shuttle is destroyed in the midst of a routine space walk.

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: Dr Ryan Stone and Matt Kowalski are stranded in space with no way to contact Earth after their shuttle is destroyed in the midst of a routine space walk.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: A woman discovers the horrifying truth about the outside world while living in an underground shelter with two men.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II
programme.desc: Time-travel sequel with Marty McFly and the eccentric inventor Doc Brown travelling back and forth in time to stop their nemesis tampering with history. By stealing the time machine and travelling back in time himself, Biff Tannen gives his younger self a book containing fifty years of sports statistics which he uses to amass an enormous gambling fortune and power.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III
programme.desc: Marty McFly travels to the American Wild West of 1885 in a desperate bid to save Doc Brown from becoming another victim of a black-hatted gunslinger.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III
programme.desc: Marty McFly travels to the American Wild West of 1885 in a desperate bid to save Doc Brown from becoming another victim of a black-hatted gunslinger.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: David Dutton is the sheriff of picture-perfect American town Ogden Marsh. One night and out of the blue one of its citizens shows up during a baseball game with a shot-gun and ready to kill. This is the beginning of a spiral of violence and mayhem.

programme.title: 28 Years Later
programme.desc: Still living in quarantine due to the rage virus, a survivor decides to venture into the dark heart of the mainland. He soon discovers a mutation that has spread to not only the infected, but other survivors as well.

programme.title: Die Alone
programme.desc: A young man with amnesia bands together with a rugged survivalist after a devastating virus causes a zombie-like outbreak.

programme.title: Die Alone
programme.desc: A young man with amnesia bands together with a rugged survivalist after a devastating virus causes a zombie-like outbreak.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: A ruthless TV host faces a problem: his gladiatorial show, in which convicts bid for their freedom against specially trained assassins, is becoming too one-sided.

programme.title: MaXXXine
programme.desc: In the 1980s Hollywood, adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. However, as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of Los Angeles, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

programme.title: The Watched
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she unknowingly becomes trapped alongside three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: Cuckoo
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Gretchen reluctantly leaves America to live with her father at a resort in the German Alps. Plagued by strange noises and bloody visions, she soon discovers a shocking secret that concerns her own family.

programme.title: Cuckoo
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Gretchen reluctantly leaves America to live with her father at a resort in the German Alps. Plagued by strange noises and bloody visions, she soon discovers a shocking secret that concerns her own family.

programme.title: Until Dawn
programme.desc: Exploring an abandoned visitor centre, Clover and her friends encounter a masked killer who murders them one by one. However, when they mysteriously wake up at the beginning of the same night, they're forced to relive the terror over and over again.

programme.title: 28 Years Later
programme.desc: Still living in quarantine due to the rage virus, a survivor decides to venture into the dark heart of the mainland. He soon discovers a mutation that has spread to not only the infected, but other survivors as well.

programme.title: The Crazies

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: David Dutton is the sheriff of picture-perfect American town Ogden Marsh. One night and out of the blue one of its citizens shows up during a baseball game with a shot-gun and ready to kill. This is the beginning of a spiral of violence and mayhem.

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A scientifically miniaturised marine unexpectedly finds himself floating around the body of a hypochondriac, and trying to outwit saboteurs who want the device that shrank him. Attempts by his colleagues to retrieve the little man - protected inside a tiny submersible - are hampered by the would-be thieves.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J goes back to the swinging 60s in a time-travelling mission to save his partner from a murderous alien.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: When an ex-cop is told that four androids, known as replicants, who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan have illegally fled back to Earth, he sets out on the trail to terminate them.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: When an ex-cop is told that four androids, known as replicants, who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan have illegally fled back to Earth, he sets out on the trail to terminate them.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: When five friends cause a deadly car accident, they cover up their involvement and keep it a secret rather than face the consequences. One year later, they find themselves stalked by a mysterious killer who knows what they did last summer.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A new bride is left under the care of friends when her husband travels to Transylvania for a meeting with Count Orlok. Plagued by horrific visions and an increasing sense of dread, she soon encounters an evil force that's far beyond her control.

programme.title: Blade: Trinity
programme.desc: Blade, now wanted by the FBI, teams up with a pair of vampire slayers to battle Dracula, the newly resurrected ancestor of the undead.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: The Big Heat
programme.desc: An honest policeman is determined to bust police corruption and the stranglehold of the Mafia. At first he innocently begins investigating the Mafia-related killing of a fellow officer, but things turn nasty when his wife is killed in a car bomb blast meant for him, his child is threatened with kidnapping and he loses his job.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Richard Kimble's wife is murdered, and he is arrested for the crime. He soon realises he has been framed, and while being transported on a prison bus, he manages to escape. On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Richard Kimble's wife is murdered, and he is arrested for the crime. He soon realises he has been framed, and while being transported on a prison bus, he manages to escape. On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test -- loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A weekend getaway turns bloody and violent when a subservient android that's built for human companionship goes haywire.

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A weekend getaway turns bloody and violent when a subservient android that's built for human companionship goes haywire.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Fast-paced apocalyptic adventure. In a hostile post-World War III world, petrol is the most precious commodity and people will do anything to get it. Embittered lone warrior Max agrees to help when an oil-producing community comes under attack from a violent gang determined to get its hands on their fuel.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: Stanley Kubrick's take on the Vietnam War follows smart-aleck Private Davis, quickly christened 'Joker' by his foul-mouthed drill sergeant, and pudgy Private Lawrence, nicknamed 'Gomer Pyle', as they endure the rigours of basic training. Though Pyle takes a frightening detour, Joker graduates to the Marine Corps and is sent to Vietnam as a journalist, covering, and eventually participating in, the Battle of Hué.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: When petty criminal Luke Jackson is sentenced to two years in a Florida prison farm, he doesn't play by the rules of either the sadistic warden or the yard's resident heavy, Dragline, who ends up admiring the new guy's unbreakable will. Luke's bravado, even in the face of repeated stints in the prison's dreaded solitary confinement cell, 'the box' makes him a rebel hero to his fellow convicts and a thorn in the side of the prison officers.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Video Games
programme.desc: From pixelated beginnings to the big screen, we bring you your favourite games that made it to the movies - from `Sonic the Hedgehog 3' to `Street Fighter' and more.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: When petty criminal Luke Jackson is sentenced to two years in a Florida prison farm, he doesn't play by the rules of either the sadistic warden or the yard's resident heavy, Dragline, who ends up admiring the new guy's unbreakable will. Luke's bravado, even in the face of repeated stints in the prison's dreaded solitary confinement cell, 'the box' makes him a rebel hero to his fellow convicts and a thorn in the side of the prison officers.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, comes back to look after her and takes her camping to find the mythological Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, comes back to look after her and takes her camping to find the mythological Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: The Wizard of Oz
programme.desc: Perennial family favourite about Dorothy, a young girl from the American Midwest, who is swept by a cyclone to a magical kingdom over the rainbow. There she meets a scarecrow, a tin man and a cowardly lion, who join her on a quest to find the all-powerful Wizard of Oz, the only man who can help her get back to Kansas. However, the Wicked Witch of the West has other plans for Dorothy and her new friends.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: A ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: A ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programme.desc: A chosen hobbit and his loyal friends join a wizard, humans, a dwarf, and an elf on a quest to destroy a powerful ring and defeat an evil lord.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: Hobbits Frodo and Sam discover they are being followed by the mysterious Gollum. A mercurial creature who has been warped by the Ring, Gollum promises to guide the Hobbits to the Black Gates of Mordor if they will release him. Middle-earth Aragorn, the Elf archer Legolas and Gimli the Dwarf encounter the besieged Rohan kingdom, whose once great King Theoden has fallen under Saruman's deadly spell.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: Hobbits Frodo and Sam discover they are being followed by the mysterious Gollum. A mercurial creature who has been warped by the Ring, Gollum promises to guide the Hobbits to the Black Gates of Mordor if they will release him. Middle-earth Aragorn, the Elf archer Legolas and Gimli the Dwarf encounter the besieged Rohan kingdom, whose once great King Theoden has fallen under Saruman's deadly spell.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: In the final showdown between the good and evil forces fighting for Middle Earth, Gandalf prepares for the battle, while Frodo and Sam march towards Mount Doom.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: A ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover. But when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyer's colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life and his liberty.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Robert McCall's mysterious past cuts especially close to home when thugs kill Susan Plummer, his best friend and former colleague. Now out for revenge, McCall must take on a crew of highly trained assassins, who will stop at nothing to destroy him.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British family's idyllic country estate.

programme.title: Juror #2
programme.desc: A juror for a high-profile murder trial finds himself struggling with a serious moral dilemma that could influence the verdict and potentially convict, or free, the accused killer.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: In this remake of the 1997 mind-bending Spanish film `Abre los Ojos', a young New York City publishing magnate finds himself on an unexpected roller-coaster ride of romance, comedy, suspicion, love, sex and dreams when a car crash leaves him maimed and charged with murder.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Seafaring drama based on the true story of a commercial fishing boat crew who become caught in a terrifying storm off the coast of Massachusetts. In the autumn of 1991, a fishing boat captain is determined to set sail despite the adverse weather conditions, but when the ice machine breaks down his decision to brave the storm rather than lose his catch results in a battle against 100ft waves.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve
programme.desc: After pulling off their Las Vegas casino heist, Danny Ocean incurs the wrath of Terry Benedict, who wants his money back with interest. Lacking the cash to meet his two-week deadline, the crew of thieves must plan an elaborate robbery in Europe, or their lives will be forfeit. While they have Danny's wife on their side, they face a new challenge in the form of the mysterious 'Night Fox', who seems to be the better thief.

programme.title: Ocean's Thirteen
programme.desc: The remaining members of Danny Ocean's gang regroup to jeopardise the nefarious plans of a businessman who double-crossed one of Danny's old friends. The team plans to ruin the opening of his glitzy Las Vegas casino and hotel by rigging the games and ensuring that every punter goes home with a jackpot.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: An amnesiac is rescued at sea by the crew of an Italian fishing boat. Nearly dead, he carries nothing but the bullets in his back and the bank account number embedded in his hip. Although completely without identity or background, he possesses an array of extraordinary talents in fighting, linguistics and self-defence that speak of a dangerous past.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Jason Bourne is living in India when he is framed by Russian agent Kirill for the theft of millions from the CIA. Kirill begins to pursue Bourne, intending to assassinate him, but while Bourne and his girlfriend, Marie, are on the run, a shot meant for him kills her instead. Vowing revenge, Bourne sets out to prove his innocence and bring the culprits to justice, but he has to evade CIA head Pamela Landry, who is convinced he is guilty.

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Harlem drug dealer Frank Lucas rises to power in corrupt 1970s New York, equalling and surpassing the notorious Mafia families with the reach of his empire. On the other side of the law, honest cop Richie Roberts dedicates himself to taking down `the most dangerous man walking the streets'. Lucas acts with impunity, smuggling heroin into the US in the coffins of American soldiers killed in Vietnam.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of London's East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: The Real CSI: Miami

programme.desc: A profile of the American actress Jean Harlow, who rose to fame as a Hollywood sex symbol and starred in several films with Clark Gable in the 1930s before her untimely death at age 26.

programme.desc: Over 40 years, Elton and David meet frequently on and off camera, forging a friendship that lays the bedrock for deeply personal interviews.

programme.title: The Nineties
programme.desc: Producing a wide range of television shows, from animated shows like `South Park' and `Beavis and Butthead' to sitcoms like `Seinfeld' and dramas like `The Sopranos'.

programme.title: All That Breathes
programme.desc: As legions of birds fall from New Delhi's skies and the city smoulders with social unrest, two brothers race to save one of the casualties, a majestic black kite, a bird of prey essential to their city's ecosystem.

programme.desc: As legions of birds fall from New Delhi's skies and the city smoulders with social unrest, two brothers race to save one of the casualties, a majestic black kite, a bird of prey essential to their city's ecosystem.

programme.title: Dogtown and Z-Boys
programme.desc: In mid-70s America, skateboarding was a fad in danger of dying out, until a small group of surfers in Santa Monica began moving to extremes in both lifestyle and techniques, using their skills in empty swimming pools and the streets to create a new form of skateboarding. Director Stacy Peralta, who was one of the group, weaves home footage of their early days with interviews with those still in the scene.

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: In the next episode of this special series, England Netball star Kadeen Corbin discusses the individuals that have inspired her during her life and career.

programme.title: The Essex Murders: Who Killed Goldfinger?
programme.desc: Infamous gangster John Palmer is gunned down in his Essex garden. Ten years later, investigators probe his role in the notorious Brink's-Mat gold heist.

programme.title: The Essex Murders: Who Killed Goldfinger?
programme.desc: The search for Palmer's killer leads to Tenerife, where he built a timeshare empire. Undercover stings and Russian mob ties expose the scale of his power.

programme.title: The Essex Murders: Who Killed Goldfinger?
programme.desc: A professional hitman is suspected in Palmer's murder. Evidence points to an Irish cartel and an Eastern European enforcer but who paid to kill Goldfinger?

programme.title: Chernobyl: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: The story of Chernobyl is told through a discovered hoard of dramatic footage filmed at the nuclear plant during the disaster and newly recorded, deeply personal interviews of those who were there.

programme.title: 2000 Meters to Andriivka
programme.desc: A Ukrainian platoon attempts to liberate a strategic village from Russian forces. A journalist joins them, observing the impacts of war and growing doubts about its resolution.

programme.title: Peter Doherty: Stranger in My Own Skin
programme.desc: In his own words, British rock star Pete Doherty candidly reveals his struggles with addiction as he fights to overcome his demons through footage that captures his downward spiral over a period of ten years.

programme.title: Premier League Legends
programme.desc: Series profiling some of the greatest players to grace the Barclays Premier League. Here the focus is on former Liverpool, Manchester City and Leeds United striker Robbie Fowler.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American actress Jean Harlow, who rose to fame as a Hollywood sex symbol and starred in several films with Clark Gable in the 1930s before her untimely death at age 26.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The story of the life and career of Academy Award-winning star of the silver screen, Russell Crowe, known for his roles in 'Gladiator', 'A Beautiful Mind', 'Les Misérables', and 'Robin Hood'.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The story of the life and career of Academy Award-winning star of the silver screen Julianne Moore, known for her roles in 'Still Alice', 'Boogie Nights', and 'The End of the Affair'.

programme.title: A Choice of Weapons: Inspired by Gordon Parks
programme.desc: Following Gordon Parks' career, from staff photographer for LIFE magazine through his artistic development photographing everyday Americans and his evolution as a novelist and filmmaker.

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.sub-title: Daddy's Dyin', Who's Got the Will?
programme.desc: King George Coulam, the ageing founder of the Texas Renaissance Festival, has ruled over his subjects for decades; general manager Jeff Baldwin believes he is next in line to succeed, until kingpin Louie Migliaccio hatches a plan to buy the festival.

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: King George goes on an unsuccessful date; Jeff struggles to thwart Louie's bid for the crown; Darla Smith, a former elephant trainer, enters the fray with an agenda of her own.

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: Jeff gains the upper hand over Louie; Darla's promotion to co-general manager leads to disastrous consequences for both Jeff and herself; George finally lands on the only successor he can trust.

programme.title: Being Mary Tyler Moore
programme.desc: Chronicling the vanguard career of Mary Tyler Moore, weaving her personal narrative with the beats of her professional accomplishments, highlighting her groundbreaking roles and the indelible impact she had on generations of women who came after her.

programme.title: Man on Wire
programme.desc: On August 7th 1974, at 7.15am, 24-year-old Frenchman Philippe Petit stepped off the edge of the South Tower of New York's World Trade Centre. Armed only with a balancing pole and intense determination, he walked out onto a single suspended wire and 'danced' for 45 minutes while balancing a quarter of a mile above the pavement below. This is the intimate story of Petit and his group of friends as they followed their dream.

programme.title: Bruce Lee: Be Water
programme.desc: Charting the struggles of Bruce Lee in two worlds after he returned to Hong Kong to complete four films following Hollywood rejection, exploring questions of identity and representation through rare archives, intimate interviews, and his writings.

programme.title: I'm Chevy Chase and You're Not
programme.desc: Step beyond the bravado of a comedy genius who once ruled SNL and Hollywood for a look into a complex and contradictory psyche, brimming with outsized gifts and infuriating flaws.

programme.title: Gary
programme.desc: Following the extraordinary story of Gary Coleman's rise to international fame as the child star of `Diff'rent Strokes', his struggles with fame, and the controversy surrounding his tragic death at the age of 42. An insight into Coleman's private world through exclusive interviews with his fellow actors, industry insiders and his estranged ex-wife and parents.

programme.title: Kurt Cobain: Montage of Heck
programme.desc: Filmmaker Brett Morgen uses material from the Cobains' personal archives in an in-depth examination of the Nirvana frontman's childhood, influential music career, and untimely death.

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: In 1952, radar picked up a series of UFOs flying over Washington DC. The story hits the newspapers, overshadowing the presidential campaign, so President Truman fights the UFOs with his most powerful weapons: disinformation and bureaucracy.

programme.title: Titanic: A Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: The sinking of RMS Titanic was one of the 20th century's greatest tragedies, but it has also been rumoured to be a crime. A range of experts take a fresh look at the case, and examine recently discovered evidence.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Find out how a lobster led archaeologists to the discovery of an 8,000-year-old Neolithic underwater settlement. Join a team at a secret location in Dorset as they excavate an Iron Age crouched burial and in London's East End, location reporter Naoise Mac Sweeney visits a modern construction site as it gives up the secrets of an Elizabethan playhouse.

programme.title: Mysteries From Above
programme.desc: Discover an underwater find from a violent past, a mysterious concrete 'ghost island' and never-before-seen tracks along the seabed.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In Minnesota, an almost 100-year-old Model A filled with crickets needs a major overhaul to see its true potential; in Georgia, Knoxy and Wu aren't monkeying around when they disinfect a horrendous Honda HR-V covered in animal faeces.

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In North Carolina, Jamie hopes to put a Honda CRX that's literally in pieces back together; in Georgia, Knoxy tries to flip a repulsive Ford Ranger that's more trouble than it's worth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient alien theorists investigate evidence suggesting that extraterrestrials have played a pivotal role in the progress of mankind.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: On March 19th, 2002, Gary McKinnon was arrested for hacking into 97 computers over a 13-month period. McKinnon claims that he found evidence of a secret American space fleet.

programme.title: Hell on Earth: WWII
programme.desc: The war enters its third year with battlefields in Eastern Europe, North Africa and the Asia Pacific. The Battle of Midway, a battle with irreversible consequences, is a victory for the USA.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: Fritz Todt was the man tasked with engineering projects including the autobahn, the West Wall defences and more. But in 1942, he died under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Hitler's Coup 1923
programme.desc: In 1923, Adolf Hitler led the infamous Beer Hall Putsch, an attempt to take power in Germany by force. It was a day that would change the world forever, birthing Hitler's Nazi regime.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: The Abyss - Rise and Fall of the Nazis

programme.title: The Abyss - Rise and Fall of the Nazis

They join marine archaeologists in the Solent as they raise the once-in-a-lifetime find of a Fairey Barracuda dive bomber. More than 2,500 Barracudas were in service during the war but not a single complete plane survives today. Naoíse Mac Sweeney joins the post excavation to reveal how the find could help bring this rare aircraft back to life.

programme.desc: Returning to South Luangwa to see the new pups born to the mighty Manzi and the tiny-but-fearless Kakumbi packs. Snowy faces a hungry hyena before a lion pride scatters Manzi mum Weka's pups, leaving her frantically searching for them.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: A lion-hyena showdown with Julz as he hunts for the elusive Manzi pack, who are missing four of their precious pups. After that, he joins Henry from the Zambian Carnivore Programme on a house call to the Kakumbi den where another pup has gone AWOL.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Iceland is the world's largest volcanic island. Its 30 active volcanoes generate one third of the world's land-based lava. It is an island on fire. But while Iceland was built by volcanoes, it was sculpted by ice.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and Jeremy travel to Argentina to meet two chimps as they prepare to bring them back to Dorset. The team attempt to sort out the macaques' hierarchy problems.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and Jeremy prepare to fly Sasha and Kangoo from Argentina to Dorset, which means crating and loading them in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.sub-title: Indonesia: The Secret Life of Manta Rays
programme.desc: The remote islands of Raja Ampat in the Indonesian archipelago are home to diverse marine life, including the secretive giants of the ocean, manta rays. A team of researchers from Conservation International heads out on an expedition to learn more about the biology, population size, and migration patterns of these astonishing animals to protect them from overfishing outside marine-protected areas.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Julz and park scout Simon track the Kakuli pack who they filmed previously, and a Manzi faction who've ditched a tracking collar and broken away from the group. The Kakumbi making a kill before a happy Manzi reunion.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Encountering an elephant as Julz and Henry track the Kakumbi pups who face off with a stubborn, razor-tusked warthog. ZCP's lion specialist Thandie Mweetwa counts the prides that are pushing the Manzi out of their territory.

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces, the Great Dividing Range separates a thin ribbon of green from the continent's arid heart.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Life isn't easy for Africa's big five megafauna. Lions, leopards, buffalo, rhinos and elephants face many threats, from competing for food in a limited landscape to avoiding hunters and poachers. Explore the incredible adaptations of each species.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Mekong
programme.desc: The Mekong basin is one of the richest areas of biodiversity in the world, yet one of the most undiscovered. 20,000 plant species, 430 mammals, 1,200 birds, 800 reptiles and amphibians, and an estimated 850 fresh water fish species, are found in this very remote Asian region. Mysteries of the Mekong is a not-to-be-missed wildlife series that will truly be a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Gangs of Baboon Falls
programme.desc: Looking back at how the gangs have fared throughout an eventful year of lockdown and return to something resembling normal, with the baboons trying to survive isolation through strength and resourcefulness.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Check in on Elsa the sloth with Pedro, who has dedicated his life to her care after a fall left her paralysed. Learn why Thor the wolf welcomed his human, Steve, into his pack.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Learn to swim with Ozzy the otter and his coach, Leslie, then see how Petronel has earned the trust of Riri the rhino orphan, who was traumatised by poachers.

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Investigate the art of nest making with the jungle's master builder: the orangutan. Shadow Max as he tries to escape the insect-filled floor of the Borneo rainforest and takes inspiration from this solitary primate's natural engineering prowess.

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Track chimpanzees through the Rwandan forest with Max, who tries to convince these powerful monkeys that he's a friend, not a foe. Pick up some key tips on jungle dining and witness complex family dynamics, including grooming and socialising.

programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: In the jungles of Thailand, clouded leopard cubs are chasing, climbing, jumping on each other and play fighting. They play these same games over and over again. The more they play, the more they hone their skills and eventually these cubs will become formidable tree-based hunters.

programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: Animal experts take a look at how different kinds of animals play in the wild, each with their own set of rules.

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Bask in the interconnected lives of wildlife shaped by volcanoes, forests, and seas. Take flight with rare Philippine eagles as they raise their young in an ancient tree, then dive into a river to catch a glimpse of the world's rarest crocodile.

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australia's Wild West
programme.desc: Step into the wild and explore Earth's greatest savannah, ancient fire traditions and a sugar glider's daring escape from the flames.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Dash across southeast Queensland as breeding and snake-catching season ramp up; Adele and Mick go up against an eastern brown, the second deadliest snake in the world; Stu and Liv tangle with a carpet python.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Launch into spring's snake surge with Liv and Stu, who intercept two male brown snakes duelling for mating rights at a construction site; stand back as Dan and Jess rescue chickens from a python and Mick and Adele hunt for a rogue green tree snake.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Weave through Queensland's coastal chaos, where Jess faces her fears chasing a lace monitor lizard up a tree with an active beehive.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Dive into tight spaces, underneath hot houses and into tense rescue situations as the catchers confront a six-foot-long, highly venomous brown snake.

programme.title: David Attenborough's First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough journeys across the globe to discover how the earliest animals developed on Earth. Attenborough meets expert fossil hunters and sees on-site some of the most remarkable finds that have transformed human understanding of the earliest animal life forms, including the first set of eyes and teeth and the first predators and parasites.

programme.title: David Attenborough's First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough's journey continues in Canada's Rocky Mountains, where fossils document an explosion in animal diversity never seen before or since. Travelling on to North Africa, the rainforests of Australia and the east coast of Scotland, Attenborough discovers how animals evolved to conquer not only the oceans but also the land and air.

programme.title: The Bachelor King
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes a bird's-eye view to explore the life of one remarkable king penguin, charting their attempts to survive, find love, and raise a family in the unforgiving Antarctic.

programme.title: The Bachelor King
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes a bird's-eye view to explore the life of one remarkable king penguin, charting their attempts to survive, find love, and raise a family in the unforgiving Antarctic.

programme.title: A Cheetah's Pride
programme.desc: Rejoin the cheetah family as the mothers collaborate to keep the cubs fed, then watch the cubs survive abandonment and harsh conditions.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: With their matriarch Ava badly wounded, the Hollywood lionesses choose to retreat and regroup. Meanwhile, the MK females use their feminine wiles to distract the nomadic band of bachelors.

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Welcome spring on the Gomoti River, where cheetah mum Phefo and lion mum Tshaba are teaching their cubs survival skills whilst keeping them out of the jaws of big male cats.

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Track Molelo's pride, who are exhausted when the winter floods arrive, and witness a scary encounter that gives leopard mum Sephiri a decision to make.

programme.title: A Cheetah's Pride
programme.desc: Rejoin the cheetah family as the mothers collaborate to keep the cubs fed, then watch the cubs survive abandonment and harsh conditions.

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: A pair of secret service agents are transferred from the president's protection team to the secret unit where the collection of every supernatural and unexplained item that the US government has ever claimed is stored.

programme.title: Warehouse 13

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After witnessing an accident, Andrea and Michonne are introduced to a new community of survivors. As conflicts arise with their new acquaintances, a decision must be made.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: Julie finds comfort in her new friends while Jim and Tabitha deal with their marriage. Ethan ventures off into the forest with Victor and Father Khatri urges Boyd to embrace his role as leader while Sara receives another horrifying directive.

programme.title: The Swarm
programme.desc: Cécile recommends stopping fishing off the coast and warning the population against using tap water, while the worms are investigated more closely.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette and the team spend their first night at Coalhouse Fort in Essex, a site believed to be a hotbed of paranormal activity such as mists, orbs, and sudden drops in room temperature.
